success_criteria: No linting errors (ESLint); Prettier formatting compliant; Commit message follows Conventional Commits; No hardcoded secrets detected.
escalation_procedure: Developer resolves locally; Peer review required if bypass attempted.
business_impact: Prevents codebase pollution and accidental secret leakage at the source.

success_criteria: TypeScript compilation succeeds; Docker container builds successfully; Helm charts validate (kubeval); Infrastructure code passes static analysis (tfsec).
tools_used: GitHub Actions, Docker Build, tfsec, kubeval
escalation_procedure: Fix build errors; Consult DevOps if infrastructure validation fails.
business_impact: Ensures deployability of artifacts and validity of IaC.

success_criteria: Global coverage > 80%; Financial Service > 100%; Auth Service > 90%; AI Ingestion > 95%; Zero failing tests.
escalation_procedure: Developer must add tests to meet specific component targets defined in Coverage Analysis.
business_impact: Maintains code stability and ensures critical financial/security logic is verified.

success_criteria: 100% pass rate on Service Integration tests; Contract tests pass for Stripe/Wise/OpenAI mocks; Database migrations apply successfully.
escalation_procedure: Investigate mock fidelity or service interface changes.
business_impact: Prevents regression in microservice communication and external API handling.

success_criteria: Zero Critical or High vulnerabilities in dependencies (SCA); Zero Critical/High in Container Scan; No IAM policy violations; Valid License checks.
tools_used: Snyk, Trivy, OPA (Open Policy Agent), OWASP Dependency Check
escalation_procedure: Immediate remediation required for Critical; Waiver process for False Positives via Security Lead.
business_impact: Ensures SOC2/GDPR compliance and prevents deployment of vulnerable assets.

success_criteria: API p95 latency < 250ms; AI Processing < 60s; Vector Search < 300ms; LCP < 2.5s; Error rate < 0.1% under load.
escalation_procedure: Performance Engineer analysis; Rollback if critical degradation confirmed.
business_impact: Guarantees user experience and system scalability per SLAs.

success_criteria: 100% pass on 'Golden Path' scenarios (Login -> SOW Upload -> Vendor Match -> Proposal -> Payment).
escalation_procedure: QA Lead investigation; Critical bug filed.
business_impact: Verifies core business value streams function correctly in a production-like environment.

success_criteria: All prior gates passed; Change Management approval granted; Rollback plan verified; Monitoring dashboards active.
escalation_procedure: Emergency Change Board approval required for bypass.
business_impact: Final human/process check to minimize production incidents.

success_criteria: Smoke tests pass; Error rate < 0.5%; CPU/Memory within baseline; No immediate regression alerts.
tools_used: Prometheus, Grafana, AWS CloudWatch, Synthetic Monitors
business_impact: Minimizes MTTR (Mean Time To Recovery) in case of bad deployment.
